home.pageTitle: AI Model Comparison, Pricing & Rankings — AI Models Navi

about.title: About
about.description: AI Models Navi is a platform providing AI model benchmark comparisons, API pricing, and model specifications in English. Data collection policy and contact information.
about.ogDesc: AI Models Navi data collection policy, information provided, and contact details.
about.whatDesc: AI Models Navi is a platform providing information about the latest AI models (large language models). It consolidates benchmark comparisons, API pricing, and model specifications to help developers and businesses make informed decisions when selecting AI models.
about.info1desc: Model rankings based on major benchmarks such as HLE, ARC-AGI-2, SWE-bench Verified
about.info2desc: Compare API pricing per 1M tokens from major providers including OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, DeepSeek
about.info3desc: Parameter counts, context windows, licenses, and performance summaries for each model
about.info4desc: Estimate monthly API costs based on usage
about.info5desc: Latest AI model news, benchmark analysis, and technical commentary
about.dataDesc: Our data is collected in the following priority order:
about.data1: Official GitHub repositories, Hugging Face model cards, product pages, and academic papers for each model
about.data2: Standard benchmarks (MMLU, GSM8K, HumanEval) and community leaderboards (LMSYS Chatbot Arena, Open LLM Leaderboard)
about.data3: Data from independent third-party evaluation organizations (e.g., Artificial Analysis)
about.dataNote: Data is updated regularly, but please check official sources for the most accurate and up-to-date information.
about.contactDesc: If you have any feedback or requests, please feel free to reach out to us at the following email address.

compare.title: AI Model Comparison — Performance & Price Showdown
compare.description: Compare popular AI models like GPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek by benchmarks, API pricing, and features. Find the best model for you.
compare.compareSub: Compare popular AI models by performance, price, and features
compare.customSub: Pick any models to compare performance and pricing side by side
compare.searchPlaceholder: Search by model name or developer...

leaderboard.title: AI Model Rankings
leaderboard.desc: Comprehensive AI model rankings across 17 benchmarks. Detailed comparisons by category.
leaderboard.comprehensiveDesc: Overall scores from HLE, ARC-AGI-2, FrontierMath, SWE-bench, τ²-Bench
leaderboard.search: Search by model name or developer

models.title: Model List
models.desc: Compare specifications, licenses, and performance summaries of major AI models.
models.search: Search by model name or developer...

recommend.title: Scenario-Based Recommendations
recommend.desc: Find the best AI model for your specific use case. Choose from 8 scenarios: code generation, writing, data analysis, and more.

valueRanking.title: Cost-Effectiveness Ranking
valueRanking.desc: AI model performance-to-cost ratio ranking. Compare models by value score (benchmark score divided by API cost).

benchmarks.title: AI Model Evaluation Benchmarks
benchmarks.desc: A list of mainstream AI model evaluation benchmarks. View benchmark descriptions and model rankings.
benchmarks.infoDesc: Each evaluation benchmark is designed to measure specific capabilities of AI models. You can evaluate model performance from diverse angles including mathematical reasoning, coding, and comprehensive understanding. Data is updated regularly to reflect the latest model scores.

pricing.title: API Pricing Comparison
pricing.desc: Compare API pricing of major AI models per 1M tokens. Data is based on official provider websites.
pricing.note: ※ Prices are based on information from official provider websites. Please check official sites for the most accurate and up-to-date pricing. Prices are shown in USD.

tools.title: Free AI Model Tools
tools.desc: Free tools to help you choose the right AI model and estimate costs

jpCapability.title: Japanese Language Performance Rating
jpCapability.desc: Compare Japanese language processing capabilities of AI models. From native JP to multilingual support.

levelDesc.native: Model developed by a Japanese company or specialized for Japanese
levelDesc.high: Multilingual model with strong Japanese processing

contextVisualizer.title: Context Window Visualizer
contextVisualizer.subtitle: Visually understand the 'memory capacity' of AI models
contextVisualizer.whatIsDesc: The maximum amount of text an AI model can process at once. Larger context windows allow analyzing longer documents or massive codebases in a single pass.
contextVisualizer.selectPrompt: Select a model to see what fits
contextVisualizer.whyMattersDesc1: A larger context window lets you process more information at once. For example, you can read an entire codebase and find bugs in one pass.
contextVisualizer.whyMattersDesc2: Bigger isn't always better though. How well the model 'understands' the context also matters.
contextVisualizer.tip: Pro tip: For long-context tasks, choose models with large windows. For short tasks, smaller models are often sufficient and cheaper.

tokenCounter.title: AI Token Counter & Prompt Cost Calculator
tokenCounter.subtitle: Paste your prompt to instantly see token count, API cost, and model comparison. 100% browser-based — your prompt never leaves your device.
tokenCounter.compareSub: Compare costs across all models with the same prompt
tokenCounter.privacy: Privacy: Your prompt is processed locally in your browser and is not sent to our servers.
tokenCounter.builderSub: Fill in the fields to auto-generate a structured prompt
tokenCounter.whyDiffer: Why Token Counts Differ Between Models
tokenCounter.howToChoose: How to Choose the Best Model for Your Prompt

usageAnalyzer.title: Usage Pattern Analyzer
usageAnalyzer.subtitle: Paste your API usage logs to get cost optimization recommendations
usageAnalyzer.placeholder:
Paste your API usage logs here...

Supported formats:

① Model: GPT-5.5, Tokens: 150000, Cost: $0.38
② GPT-5.5 | 150000 | $0.38
③ GPT-5.5	150000	0.38
④ {"model": "GPT-5.5", "tokens": 150000, "cost": 0.38}
usageAnalyzer.tip1: Reducing usage of expensive models can significantly cut costs
usageAnalyzer.tip2: Using batch processing can reduce the number of requests
usageAnalyzer.tip3: Leveraging prompt caching can reduce costs for repeated requests
usageAnalyzer.noData: Paste your logs and click Analyze to get started
usageAnalyzer.error: Failed to parse logs. Please check the format.

costCalculator.title: AI Cost Optimizer
costCalculator.subtitle: Enter a model and usage to estimate costs and get optimization recommendations
costCalculator.noData: Standard pricing data not found for this model.
costCalculator.note: ※ This calculation is an estimate. Actual pricing is based on each provider's official price list.
costCalculator.savingsDesc: These models offer similar quality at lower cost
costCalculator.proDesc: Advanced optimization analytics and usage pattern tracking
costCalculator.tip1: Using batch processing can reduce API costs by up to 50%
costCalculator.tip2: Leveraging prompt caching can reduce costs for repeated requests
costCalculator.tip3: Choosing the right model for each task maintains quality while reducing costs
